text.title: Welcome
text.subtitle: Log in to continue.
text.lost2FACodes: Lost your codes? Get a link to reset two-factor authentication
text.successLost2FACodes: A reset link has been successfully sent. Please check your email for further instructions

text2fa.title: Additional verification required
text2fa.subtitle: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication (2FA).
text2fa.text: To finish signing in, enter the code from the authenticator app.
